title: Shikanoko Nokonoko Koshitantan
description: Adds the silly little deer song to Minecraft 1.20.1!
body:
Have you ever wanted to listen to the silly little deer song but are too lazy to get off Minecraft and go to YouTube?

No? Just me?

Well, I dont really care what you think :3

This mod is pretty simple, just adding the intro song from _My Deer Friend Nokotan_ as a music disk, into Minecraft 1.20.1! This mod is currently available for Forge 1.20.1, but will hopefully be available for Fabric 1.20.1, and both Forge and Fabric 1.21 in the near future!

Hope you enjoy!
